forensic_reasoning_log: Extracted 'Profit before Finance Costs, Depreciation and Exceptional Items' as EBITDA from the Standalone financial results table for FY14. Consolidated financials were not provided in the document snippet, hence fallback to Standalone.

Auditor explicitly states under point 10 of the Annexure to Independent Auditors’ Report that 'The Company has not incurred any cash losses during the financial year covered by our audit'. Mapped to hardcoded status value 'NOT_INCURRED'.
